daily.today_energy: Your mind's moving at lightning speed today, Gemini. Channel that restless vibe into creative projects instead of doom-scrolling. The universe is basically handing you permission to be weird and brilliant.
daily.love: Someone's picking up on your energy shifts. Whether it's romantic or platonic, authenticity is your superpower rn. Stop overthinking the text—just send it.
daily.career: Ideas are flowing, but focus matters more than volume today. Pick your top 3 projects and actually finish one. Your future self will be grateful for the momentum you're building.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement—walking, dancing, stretching, anything. Mental clarity follows when you get out of your own head. Hydrate like it's your job.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. You're basically a walking conversation starter rn. Lean into the chaos, trust your gut instincts, and let your natural curiosity lead you somewhere unexpected. Major plot twist energy.
weekly.love: Someone's picking up on your vibe this week—whether that's a crush or your bestie needing real talk. Don't overthink the signals. Sometimes the best connections happen when you're just being authentically you, no script required.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. That project or proposal you've been sitting on? Time to actually pitch it. The universe is basically handing you a megaphone. Trust that your voice matters and your perspective is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for gentleness. Consider swapping doom-scrolling for something grounding—walks, journaling, whatever makes you feel solid. Your mind and body are connected; treating both with care compounds the good energy.
